criteria.description: bugsCsvTable(bugs) factored out and exported; writeBugsCsv uses it; written CSV byte-identical
With an active list, box offers Download filtered CSV/JSON; hidden when no list active
Browser filter mirrors filterBugsByExclusion (drop-if-complete-and-all-excluded; else trim+scale)
Filtered CSV uses bugsCsvTable header/escaping; filtered JSON preserves archive shape; filenames carry domain/date/filtered
Docs updated (CLAUDE.md three-layer note + FEATURES.md) for the filtered-export capability and its semantics
Progressive enhancement; existing unfiltered download links keep working with JS off
Fetch only on user click; nothing added to page-load bytes/requests; reuse existing IO/CSS patterns
Filtered export consistent with the on-screen view (same <=25-sample conservative rule); UI labels it
No new data files, no data/API schema change, no new npm deps; pre-built static files untouched
Severity taxonomy and CSV column schema unchanged (refactor behaviour-preserving)
Unit tests for bugsCsvTable parity; browser fetch->filter->download verified in Chromium; test:unit/i18n/spec-kitty green
Net added CSS/JS within budget; serializer/filter reuse existing logic; controls inert without an active list
